allow: Bash(python -c "import torch; print\('CUDA available:', torch.cuda.is_available\(\)\); print\('GPU:', torch.cuda.get_device_name\(0\) if torch.cuda.is_available\(\) else 'N/A'\)")

Bash(KMP_DUPLICATE_LIB_OK=TRUE python -c "import torch; print\('CUDA available:', torch.cuda.is_available\(\)\); print\('GPU:', torch.cuda.get_device_name\(0\) if torch.cuda.is_available\(\) else 'N/A'\)")
Bash(python -c "import torch; print\('torch version:', torch.__version__\); print\('cuda version in torch:', torch.version.cuda\)")
